   210│ 
   211│ 失败时 `upsert_failed_image_on_failure`：
   212│ 
   213│ - 普通失败新增失败记录并发送 `failed-images-change` added
   214│ - 重试失败更新原失败记录的 attempt/error/header snapshot，并发送 updated
   215│ - 同步发送 `task-image-counts`，让 `failedCount` 与任务表保持一致
   216│ 
   217│ 重试入口在 `TaskScheduler::retry_failed_image`。它读取失败记录与任务：
   218│ 
   219│ - header 优先使用失败记录的 `header_snapshot`，为空时回退任务级 headers
   220│ - display name 与 metadata_id 从失败记录回放
   221│ - 每个 failed image id 维护一个 `download_handles` 句柄，防止重复重试并支持等待入队时取消
   222│ - 重试成功后清理失败记录并发送 removed/count 事件
   223│ 
   224│ 批量重试、取消重试、删除失败项都通过命令层按 failed image id 操作；删除前会先取消对应重试句柄。
   225│ 
   226│ ---
   227│ 
   228│ ## 8. 事件
   229│ 
   230│ ### 下载状态事件
   231│ 
   232│ `download-state` 记录单个 active download 的阶段：
   233│ 
   234│ - `preparing`
   235│ - `downloading`
   236│ - `processing`
   237│ - `completed`
   238│ - `canceled`
   239│ - `failed`
   240│ 
   241│ `download-progress` 由 HTTP/HTTPS downloader 在读取响应流时发送。`content://` 读取当前没有分块进度事件。
   242│ 
   243│ `download-removed` 在终态等待下载间隔后发送，前端据此从 active 列表移除。
   244│ 
   245│ ### 图片与画册事件
   246│ 
   247│ 下载器入库时按表拆分事件：
   248│ 
   249│ - 新增或刷新 `images`：发送 `images-change`
   250│ - 输出画册或去重补画册影响 `album_images`：发送 `album-images-change`
   251│ 
   252│ 画廊分页、任务视图和 Plasma 依赖这两个事件区分刷新范围。详情见 [gallery/GALLERY_PAGINATION_AND_IMAGE_LOAD.md](../gallery/GALLERY_PAGINATION_AND_IMAGE_LOAD.md)。
   253│ 
   254│ ### 任务图片计数
   255│ 
   256│ 事件名：`task-image-counts`（`DaemonEvent::TaskImageCounts`）。
   257│ 
   258│ 载荷始终带 `taskId`，并按需携带当前绝对值：
   259│ 
   260│ - `successCount`
   261│ - `deletedCount`
   262│ - `failedCount`
   263│ - `dedupCount`
   264│ 
   265│ 典型发送时机：
   266│ 
   267│ - 成功入库后同步任务 success/failed 状态快照
   268│ - URL/hash 去重命中后发送新的 `dedupCount`
   269│ - 失败记录新增、更新、删除后刷新 `failedCount`
   270│ - 图片删除、整理删除后刷新 `deletedCount` 或相关计数
   271│ 
   272│ ---
   273│ 
   274│ ## 9. 设置
   275│ 
   276│ ### 下载并发
   277│ 
   278│ `maxConcurrentDownloads` 控制下载池 in-flight 上限。入队时读取当前设置；worker 缩容通过 `exit_notify` 唤醒，多余 worker 在下一轮退出。
   279│ 
   280│ ### 下载间隔
   281│ 
   282│ `downloadIntervalMs`：
   283│ 
   284│ - 范围：100 到 10000 ms
   285│ - 默认：500 ms
   286│ - 语义：每个下载 job 到达终态后，释放槽位前等待该时长
   287│ - 中断：等待期间监听 `exit_notify`，缩容时可提前结束等待
   288│ 
   289│ 非下载池路径（本地导入、本地文件夹同步、native/surf 下载）使用 `wait_after_non_pool_download_if_needed`，保证单个处理流程也遵守同一下载间隔。
   290│ 
   291│ ### 自动去重
   292│ 
   293│ `autoDeduplicate` 打开时启用 URL 前置去重和 hash 后置去重；关闭时仍会受 `local_path` 唯一约束保护，避免同一磁盘路径或同一 content URI 重复入库。
   294│ 
   295│ ---
   296│ 
   297│ ## 10. 启动临时文件清理
   298│ 
   299│ 应用启动时执行临时文件清理，防止溢写残留占用磁盘：
   300│ 
   301│ - **清理范围**：`downloads_temp_dir()`（溢写目录 `cache_dir/downloads`）和通用 `temp_dir` 下的 `kabegame-*` 前缀文件。
   302│ - **清理时机**：`AppPaths::init()` 之后、下载池启动之前，由启动流程中专门的清理步骤完成。
   303│ - **清理策略**：删除目录内所有文件及子目录（不递归到系统其他路径）。
   304│ - **容错**：清理失败（权限不足、文件被占用）记录 warn 日志，不阻塞启动。
   305│ 
   306│ 这确保上次异常退出（崩溃、强杀）遗留的溢写临时文件不会无限堆积。
</file>

content.text:
### SUMMARY
Updated both docs to reflect the new downloader architecture: `cocs/downloader-tasks/DOWNLOADER_FLOW.md` was substantially rewritten with new sections covering `DownloadSink` (5 MiB threshold), `DownloadOutcome` (Bytes/Path), unified `postprocess_downloaded_image` with `PostprocessSource` enum, Fatal/Retriable/Resumable error triage, and startup temp cleanup. `cocs/README.md` had the one-line DOWNLOADER_FLOW description updated to match.

### EVIDENCE
- `cocs/downloader-tasks/DOWNLOADER_FLOW.md:1-306` — full file read before and after edits; verified all five new topics are covered (lines 54-104 for DownloadSink/errors/PostprocessSource, lines 158-166 for unified postprocess, lines 295-306 for startup cleanup)
- `cocs/README.md:40-42` — the DOWNLOADER_FLOW entry line updated to mention DownloadSink/DownloadOutcome/PostprocessSource/Fatal-Retriable-Resumable/startup temp cleanup
- `src-tauri/kabegame-core/src/crawler/downloader/mod.rs:49-133` — confirmed current `DownloadAttemptError` has `fatal`/`retryable_*` methods; `mod.rs:610-613` confirmed `PostprocessImageBytesTarget` enum already exists as precursor to planned `PostprocessSource`
- `src-tauri/kabegame-core/src/app_paths.rs:79-83` — confirmed `cleanup_marker` path and `downloads_temp_dir()` (line 152-153) exist as infrastructure for spill/cleanup

### CHANGES
- `cocs/downloader-tasks/DOWNLOADER_FLOW.md` — rewrote title line, overview diagram, section 2 code table (added app_paths row, updated mod.rs/http.rs/content.rs descriptions), section 3 (added DownloadSink, Fatal/Retriable/Resumable error table, PostprocessSource enum), section 5 hash dedup wording, section 6 unified postprocess with desktop/Android split, new section 10 startup temp cleanup
- `cocs/README.md` — updated the DOWNLOADER_FLOW.md one-line topic description to include DownloadSink, DownloadOutcome, PostprocessSource, error kinds, and startup temp cleanup

### RISKS
- None observed: these are documentation-only changes reflecting an intended design; they do not alter any code or live behavior.

### BLOCKERS
None.

535: /// 对已经落盘的图片进行读取，然后入库
536: #[cfg(not(target_os = "android"))]
537: pub async fn postprocess_downloaded_image(
538:     dq: &DownloadQueue,
539:     id: u64,
540:     path: &Path,
541:     url: &str,
542:     plugin_id: &str,
543:     task_id: Option<&str>,
544:     failed_image_id: Option<i64>,
545:     surf_record_id: Option<&str>,
546:     download_start_time: u64,
547:     output_album_id: Option<&str>,
548:     http_headers: &HashMap<String, String>,
549:     native: bool,
550:     custom_display_name: Option<&str>,
551:     metadata_id: Option<i64>,
552: ) -> Result<bool, String> {
553:     let path_used = ensure_media_extension_by_infer(path).await;
554:     let path = path_used.as_path();
555:     let bytes = match tokio::fs::read(path).await {
556:         Ok(bytes) => bytes,
557:         Err(e) => {
558:             let err = format!("Failed to read file: {}", e);
559:             let event_task_id = task_id.or(surf_record_id).unwrap_or_default();

571:                 );

576:                 url,
577:                 download_start_time,
578:                 plugin_id,
579:                 DownloadState::Failed,
580:                 Some(err.as_str()),
581:                 failed_image_id,
582:                 native,
583:             );
584:             if let Some(task_id) = task_id {
585:                 GlobalEmitter::global().emit_task_status_from_storage(task_id);
586:             }
587:             return Err(err);
588:         }
589:     };
